data.kustomization:
apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization
patches:
- patch: |-
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    metadata:
      name: argocd-repo-server
    spec:
      template:
        spec:
          containers:
          - name: argocd-repo-server
            resources:
              limits:
                memory: 2Gi
              requests:
                cpu: 750m
                memory: 1Gi
    target:
      kind: Deployment
      name: argocd-repo-server
